calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Adam Glen Slote of the law offices of Slote Links & Boreman LLP (415-393-8012) appears as counsel for petitioner, Syed K. Zaidi

Deputy Attorney General, Mara Faust of the California Department of Justice (916-324-5358) appears as counsel for respondent, Medical Board of California

The Court issues a tentative ruling from the bench with both sides present. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PETITIONER SYED ZAIDI'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is taken UNDER SUBMISSION as of this date by Judge Charlene P. Kiesselbach.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
